retrieved_result: Self-directedness "From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia (Redirected from Self-Directedness)navigation search Self-directedness is a personality trait of self-determination, that is, the ability to regulate and adapt behavior to the demands of a situation in order to achieve personally chosen goals and values.
